# PERF-070 negative: the goroutine is tied to the request via a sync.WaitGroup
lang: go
file: PERF-070-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"sync"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func backgroundWork() {
	// runs to completion before the response is returned
}

func BoundedHandler(c *gin.Context) {
	defer c.Request.Body.Close()
	var workerCount = 1
	_ = workerCount
	var wg sync.WaitGroup
	wg.Add(1)
	go func() {
		wg.Done()
		backgroundWork()
	}()
	wg.Wait()
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"ok": true})
	_ = http.StatusOK
}
